name: Video Input
description: Provides video file input to the workflow. Passes video path for processing.
doc:
Select a video file for processing.

Supported Formats:
• MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM

Output:
Returns the video file path for use with video processing nodes.

Common Uses:
• Video Gen - extend or modify videos
• Speech to Text - transcribe audio track
• Video Frame Extractor - get frames as images

Tip: Preview the video in the node to verify selection.
